text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 
33 
su_email_stat: Email indicator 
SAS Format: $ESTATF 
N: No, no email identified for enrollee 
Y: Yes, email identified for enrollee 
su_mode: Survey Data Collection Mode 
SAS Format: $MODEF 
I: INBOUND CATI 
M: MAIL 
N: NA 
O: OUTBOUND CATI 
W: WEB 
su_type: Survey Type (1-4) 
SAS Format: $TYPEF 
1: MA PDP 
2: MA ONLY 
3: PDP 
4: FFS 
su_web_surv: Indicates Whether Submitted Web Survey Came from Prenotification Letter, Web Invitation, or Reminder 
SAS Format:
